calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2016 Continued To Nov-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion To Strike The Plaintiffs Complaint In Its Entirety, Or In The Alternative, Seal The Complaint, And To Seal Exhibit A To Joseph C. Liburt Declaration
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Geneva A. Collins of Gordon & Rees LLP (415-986-5900) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Brent Kasper

Attorney, Alexandra Pavlidakis of Orrick Herringtom & Sutcliffe LLP (650-614-7372) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Pagerduty Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS PAGERDUTY, INC. and BRENT KASPER's Motion To Strike The Plaintiffs Complaint In Its Entirety, Or In The Alternative, Seal The Complaint, And To Seal Exhibit A To Joseph C. Liburt Declaration is GRANTED in part. Defendants' motion to seal the complaint and exhibit A to Mr. Liburt's declaration is granted. No opposition filed and the motion meets the requirements of CRC 2.550 et seq. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org. (D302)
